name: supabase
description: Supabase database, auth, and edge functions — query the DB, manage schema, deploy edge functions. Use for any project backed by Supabase.

tools.name: supabase_list_tables
tools.description: List all tables in the project's public schema.

tools.name: supabase_execute_sql
tools.description: Run a read-only SQL query against the database. Use to inspect data, not to mutate (use supabase_apply_migration for that).

tools.name: supabase_apply_migration
tools.description: Apply a SQL migration. DESTRUCTIVE — the hook layer will require an explicit confirmation file at .forge/supabase-migration-approved before this can run.

tools.name: supabase_generate_types
tools.description: Generate TypeScript types from the current database schema. Useful for keeping the frontend in sync after schema changes.

tools.name: supabase_deploy_edge_function
tools.description: Deploy a Supabase Edge Function. The deployer calls this after a function is implemented and tested locally.

tools.name: supabase_get_advisors
tools.description: Run Supabase performance and security advisors. Called by the validator to catch RLS gaps, missing indexes, and slow queries.

envVars.name: SUPABASE_PROJECT_REF
envVars.description: Project reference (the subdomain in your Supabase URL, e.g. 'abcdefgh' for 'abcdefgh.supabase.co').
